tasks.title: Split internal/extract/types_test.go into smaller test files
evidence: internal/extract/types_test.go is 1049 LOC, exceeding the 1000 LOC threshold.
AGENTS.md states files exceeding ~1000 LOC are presumed to be mis-scoped and MUST be split unless proven otherwise.

File contains 12 main test functions testing different types: FieldValue, ExtractOptions, Template, SelectorRule, JSONLDRule, RegexRule, NormalizeSpec, Extracted, NormalizedDocument, ValidationResult, Schema, and TemplateRegistry.
plan: Analyze the 12 test functions in types_test.go to group by related types (e.g., rule types, document types, template types).
Split into 3-4 smaller test files with clear, focused responsibilities (e.g., types_fields_test.go, types_rules_test.go, types_documents_test.go, types_templates_test.go).
Ensure all tests are preserved and run successfully after split.
Run make ci to verify the changes don't break anything.
tasks.request: Identify large files with large LOC and create a task to have each file refactored into smaller files. Group closely related files by directory/module patterns for batching within a single task but do not overload any single task.
